Beyond Jira — Navigation with unsent text prompts confirmation
Given A recruiter with Modify/Send on conversational email where this slice applies on a tenant staged for this epic; Jira’s first *Given* already includes: I have entered text or made edits in the email...

Draft discard integrity
Given I have unsaved recruiter edits in compose chrome this story owns
When I choose Discard (or navigate away) and confirm any dialog
Then the thread returns to the last saved recruiter-visible state with no silent partial send
